mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_column_meta WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_column_meta ( table_code, field, title, data_type, form_type, dict_type, show_in_list, show_in_form, searchable, sortable, required, width, sort_order, rules_json, placeholder, default_value, status, component_props, data_source, api_url, label_field, value_field, col_span, section_key, i18n_key, visible_condition ) VALUES ( #{tableCode}, #{field}, #{title}, #{dataType}, #{formType}, #{dictType}, #{showInList}, #{showInForm}, #{searchable}, #{sortable}, #{required}, #{width}, #{sortOrder}, #{rulesJson}, #{placeholder}, #{defaultValue}, #{status}, #{componentProps}, #{dataSource}, #{apiUrl}, #{labelField}, #{valueField}, #{colSpan}, #{sectionKey}, #{i18nKey}, #{visibleCondition} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_column_meta SET field = #{field}, title = #{title}, data_type = #{dataType}, form_type = #{formType}, dict_type = #{dictType}, show_in_list = #{showInList}, show_in_form = #{showInForm}, searchable = #{searchable}, sortable = #{sortable}, required = #{required}, width = #{width}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, rules_json = #{rulesJson}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, default_value = #{defaultValue}, status = #{status}, component_props = #{componentProps}, data_source = #{dataSource}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, label_field = #{labelField}, value_field = #{valueField}, col_span = #{colSpan}, section_key = #{sectionKey}, i18n_key = #{i18nKey}, visible_condition = #{visibleCondition} WHERE id = #{id}
